plist.dict:
EnableBootArgs
Enabled
ProbGuard
Enabled
ProbGuardAllProcesses
Enabled
ZeroOnFree
Enabled
AllowInternalSecurityPolicy
DevelopmentPhase UnderDevelopment
SecureAllocator_ThreadCaching
DevelopmentPhase #if TARGET_OS_IOS || TARGET_OS_VISION || TARGET_OS_OSX || TARGET_OS_TV FeatureComplete #else UnderDevelopment #endif
SecureAllocator_GuardObjects
DevelopmentPhase #if TARGET_OS_IOS || TARGET_OS_VISION || TARGET_OS_OSX FeatureComplete #else UnderDevelopment #endif
#if TARGET_OS_TV SecureAllocator_SystemWide
DevelopmentPhase FeatureComplete
#endif
#define SECURE_ALLOCATOR_PROCESS_FEATURE(name, state) \ SecureAllocator_process_##name \ \ DevelopmentPhase \ state \
#if TARGET_OS_IOS SECURE_ALLOCATOR_PROCESS_FEATURE(aegirposter, UnderDevelopment) SECURE_ALLOCATOR_PROCESS_FEATURE(CollectionsPoster, UnderDevelopment) #endif
#if TARGET_OS_OSX SECURE_ALLOCATOR_PROCESS_FEATURE(VTEncoderXPCService, UnderDevelopment) #endif
#if TARGET_OS_WATCH SECURE_ALLOCATOR_PROCESS_FEATURE(backboardd, UnderDevelopment) SECURE_ALLOCATOR_PROCESS_FEATURE(ClockFace, UnderDevelopment) #endif
